game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.description: Welcome to Skat Solo Challenge! Master the classic German card game of Skat across three challenging levels. Compete against two AI opponents in trick-taking rounds where strategy is key. As the declarer, you'll bid, choose your game type, and aim to collect at least 61 card points from your tricks. As an opponent, work to stop the declarer from succeeding. Win 2 out of 3 rounds per level to advance. Progress from Novice to Apprentice to Master, facing increasingly intelligent AI opponents. Earn bonus points for special achievements like Schneider and Schwarz victories. Can you become the Skat Master?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Select card in your hand
Space: Play selected card
Arrow Up: Increase bid during bidding phase
Arrow Down: Pass during bidding phase
Shift: Take Skat cards (when declarer)
Z: Discard selected card (when discarding phase)
Enter: Start game / Confirm selections
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu
